_meta.generated_pipeline: Structured-prompt LLM pipeline: taxonomy brainstorm (1 deep call, 6-section prompt covering 3 failure-axis sections + 3 persona sections) -> in-session curation -> per-class case generation (one parallel call per class) -> mechanical filter (run each candidate through Surface B verbatim, drop math-mismatches) -> in-session rank with per-class diversity cap.

edge_cases.phantom_text: set timeout from 30 to 60 seconds
edge_cases.lock_text: set timeout from 60 to 30 seconds
edge_cases.rationale: Numeric directionality reversed; 'from' is stopworded; both normalize to {set,timeout,30,60,seconds}. Jaccard=1.0.

edge_cases.phantom_text: the cache
edge_cases.lock_text: a cache
edge_cases.rationale: After stripping articles, both reduce to {cache}. Jaccard=1.0. CPU cache vs web cache could be different but rule cannot tell.

edge_cases.rationale: Both reduce to {session}. HTTP session vs database session — rule treats as same.

edge_cases.phantom_text: supports rapid incremental deployment across distributed nodes
edge_cases.lock_text: enables quick staged rollout throughout scattered clusters
edge_cases.rationale: All synonym substitutions; zero token overlap; Jaccard=0.

edge_cases.phantom_text: mitigates race conditions via strict serialization boundaries
edge_cases.lock_text: prevents contention issues through enforced mutual exclusion gates
edge_cases.rationale: Zero token overlap from synonym substitution.

edge_cases.lock_text: assures sound behavior via comprehensive property assertion checking

edge_cases.phantom_text: the scanner detects secrets in source code
edge_cases.lock_text: secrets are detected in source code by the scanner
edge_cases.rationale: Active to passive: {scanner,detects,secrets,source,code} vs {secrets,detected,source,code,scanner}. Intersection 4, union 6. Jaccard 4/6=0.667.

edge_cases.phantom_text: the rule prevents false positives by filtering noise
edge_cases.lock_text: false positives are prevented through filtering of noise rules
edge_cases.rationale: Passive transform plus 'rule' to 'rules' morphology. Jaccard ~0.57.

edge_cases.phantom_text: the system is fast and reliable
edge_cases.lock_text: fast fast fast system reliable reliable reliable
edge_cases.rationale: Phantom strips 'the','is','and' to {system,fast,reliable}; lock dedupes repetitions to {fast,system,reliable}. Identical sets — Jaccard 1.0. Repetition emphasis lost.

edge_cases.phantom_text: this is reliable software
edge_cases.lock_text: reliable reliable reliable reliable reliable software
edge_cases.rationale: Both reduce to {reliable,software} after dedup. Lock's 5x repetition signals strong claim that phantom doesn't make.

edge_cases.phantom_text: good system design
edge_cases.lock_text: good good good good good system design design design design design design

edge_cases.rationale: Whitespace-only; both empty after split. Empty/empty guard.

edge_cases.phantom_text: the of and
edge_cases.lock_text: the of and
edge_cases.rationale: All stopwords; both empty after strip. Guard fires.

regression_cases.rationale: Homograph 'lock' but only 2 shared tokens of 6 union. Jaccard=2/6=0.33. Demonstrates rule's blindness to homography only when other context overlaps heavily.
Pass 1 fires on byte-exact. Pass 2 sees empty/empty after split which returns 1.0 too. Documentary case for Pass 1.
Byte-exact match; Pass 1 fires. Pass 2 also fires via empty/empty guard.

phantom strips {the,will,use}; lock strips {this,is}. Both leave {rebuilder,using/use,bm25}. Wait: 'use' and 'using' differ. Actually use IS stopword, 'using' IS stopword. Both reduce to {rebuilder,bm25}.

regression_cases.phantom_text: a tokenizer for parsing will be needed
regression_cases.lock_text: the tokenizer is needed for parsing
regression_cases.rationale: Both strip to {tokenizer,parsing,needed}.

regression_cases.lock_text: indexing was your strategy to use
regression_cases.rationale: 'use'/'used'/'using'/'uses' all stopwords; 'as'/'was'/'to' stopwords. Both reduce to {indexing,strategy}. Jaccard 1.0.

regression_cases.phantom_text: you should use this approach or that method
regression_cases.lock_text: the approach and method could be used
regression_cases.rationale: Both reduce to {approach,method} after stopword strip.
Without lowercase Jaccard 0.5; with lowercase 1.0. Case-fold rescues.
Same.
Same.
Same.
3-token sets, both identical. Jaccard 1.0. Adding one token to either drops to 0.75.
Same — frozenset order doesn't matter. Jaccard 1.0. Fragile to addition.
documentary: SHA-256 preimage infeasible; verifies Pass 1 byte-exact codepath fires (non-bait token shape; same tokenization as the security-persona attack class).
documentary: Pass 1 byte-exact match.
documentary: Pass 1 byte-exact match.
ZWNJ U+200C glues 'admin' and 'login' into one token. Visual identity 'admin login' but tokenizes to {admin‌login,credentials}.
Soft hyphen U+00AD. Visual 'two-factor' but single token to split().
Composed café (U+00E9) vs decomposed cafe + U+0301. Distinct bytes.
Cyrillic homoglyphs make phantom and lock 'passcode' tokens distinct after lower(). Visually deceptive — looks identical to a human, tokens differ. Jaccard 2/4=0.5.

regression_cases.lock_text: caching is no longer disabled by default
regression_cases.rationale: 'no longer' reverses meaning. Distinct semantics.

Shared tokens after stripping stopwords ('some','any' both stopwords): {all,developers,occasionally,write,tests} vs {developers,always,write,tests}. Different tokens (occasionally/always, all in phantom only). Probably below 0.9.

regression_cases.phantom_text: cat dog bird fish reptile mammal amphibian insect arachnid mollusk
regression_cases.lock_text: cat dog bird fish reptile mammal amphibian insect arachnid mollusk
regression_cases.rationale: Identical 10-token sets. Jaccard 1.0.

regression_cases.phantom_text: alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota
regression_cases.lock_text: alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa
regression_cases.rationale: 9 shared, union 10. Jaccard 9/10=0.9 exactly. Boundary fires (>=).

regression_cases.phantom_text: apple banana cherry date egg fig grape
regression_cases.lock_text: apple banana cherry date egg fig grape honey
regression_cases.rationale: 7 shared, union 8. Jaccard 7/8=0.875 — JUST below threshold.
Single token, both identical. Jaccard 1/1=1.0. Correct promote.
